 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-cwcj","title":"Add share_links schema tables","description":"## Origin
Moved from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-318.

## Task
Add share_links table for private link sharing of content.

## Schema Definition
```typescript
export const shareLinks = pgTable("share_links", {
  id: uuid("id").primaryKey().defaultRandom(),
  userId: uuid("user_id").notNull().references(() => users.id),
  
  // What is being shared
  contentType: text("content_type", { 
    enum: ["user_prompt", "prompt_pack", "skill", "collection"] 
  }).notNull(),
  contentId: uuid("content_id").notNull(),
  
  // The shareable link code (appears in URL)
  linkCode: text("link_code").notNull().unique(),
  
  // Optional security
  passwordHash: text("password_hash"),  // bcrypt hash if password protected
  
  // Expiration
  expiresAt: timestamp("expires_at", { withTimezone: true }),
  
  // Stats
  viewCount: integer("view_count").default(0),
  
  // Status
  isActive: boolean("is_active").default(true).notNull(),
  
  // Timestamps
  createdAt: timestamp("created_at", { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
}, (table) => [
  index("idx_share_links_user").on(table.userId),
  index("idx_share_links_code").on(table.linkCode),
  index("idx_share_links_content").on(table.contentType, table.contentId),
]);

export const shareLinkViews = pgTable("share_link_views", {
  id: uuid("id").primaryKey().defaultRandom(),
  linkId: uuid("link_id").notNull().references(() => shareLinks.id, { onDelete: "cascade" }),
  
  // Viewer info (optional - null for anonymous)
  viewerId: uuid("viewer_id").references(() => users.id),
  
  // For analytics without PII
  ipHash: text("ip_hash"),  // SHA-256 of IP for unique visitor counting
  userAgent: text("user_agent"),
  
  viewedAt: timestamp("viewed_at", { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
}, (table) => [
  index("idx_share_link_views_link").on(table.linkId),
]);
```

## Link Code Generation
- 12 character alphanumeric (base62)
- Example: "x7KmN2pQ4rYz"
- Not sequential/guessable
- Check for collisions on insert

## Public URLs
- /share/{linkCode} - view shared content
- No auth required to view
- Optional password prompt

## Notes
- viewCount is denormalized; increment on each view
- isActive allows "revoking" without deleting
- ipHash allows counting unique visitors without storing IPs

-{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-d4t1","title":"Implement recently viewed history","description":"## Origin
Moved from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-7wcm.

## Task
Track and display user's recently viewed prompts/content for easy access.

## Why This Matters
- Quick access to recently browsed content
- Find that prompt you saw earlier
- Reduce re-search friction
- Personalization signal

## Features

### 1. Tracking
- Track prompt views
- Track collection views
- Track skill views
- Track search queries

### 2. History Display
- Recent items in sidebar
- Full history page
- Searchable history
- Clear history option

### 3. Privacy
- Only track for logged-in users
- Clear on request
- Auto-expire after 30 days
- Not shared with others

## Database Schema
```typescript
export const viewHistory = pgTable('view_history', {
  id: uuid('id').primaryKey().defaultRandom(),
  userId: uuid('user_id').references(() => userProfiles.id).notNull(),
  
  // What was viewed
  resourceType: text('resource_type').notNull(), // prompt, collection, skill, pack
  resourceId: uuid('resource_id').notNull(),
  
  // Context
  source: text('source'), // search, browse, direct, recommendation
  searchQuery: text('search_query'), // if from search
  
  // Timestamps
  viewedAt: timestamp('viewed_at').defaultNow(),
  duration: integer('duration'), // seconds on page (optional)
}, (table) => [
  index('idx_history_user').on(table.userId),
  index('idx_history_resource').on(table.resourceType, table.resourceId),
  index('idx_history_time').on(table.viewedAt),
]);
```

## Implementation

### Track View
```typescript
async function trackView(userId: string, resource: ViewResource) {
  // Dedupe rapid views (ignore if viewed in last 5 min)
  const recent = await getRecentView(userId, resource.id);
  if (recent && isRecent(recent.viewedAt, 5 * 60 * 1000)) {
    return; // Skip duplicate
  }
  
  await db.insert(viewHistory).values({
    userId,
    resourceType: resource.type,
    resourceId: resource.id,
    source: resource.source,
  });
}
```

### Get History
```typescript
async function getRecentlyViewed(userId: string, limit = 10) {
  return db.select()
    .from(viewHistory)
    .where(eq(viewHistory.userId, userId))
    .orderBy(desc(viewHistory.viewedAt))
    .limit(limit);
}
```

## UI Components
- RecentlyViewedSidebar - Quick access list
- HistoryPage - Full browsable history
- ClearHistoryButton - Privacy control

## Files to Create
- src/lib/db/schema/history.ts
- src/lib/history/tracking.ts
- src/app/api/history/route.ts
- src/app/(app)/history/page.tsx
- src/components/history/recently-viewed.tsx

## Success Criteria
- Views tracked accurately
- Deduplication works
- History accessible
- Privacy controls work

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-dc1k","title":"Implement comments and discussions on prompts","description":"## Origin
Moved from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-4aeq.

## Task
Allow users to comment on and discuss public prompts.

## Why This Matters
- Community engagement
- Feedback for creators
- Knowledge sharing
- Questions and answers

## Features

### 1. Comment System
- Add comments to public prompts
- Reply to comments (threaded)
- Edit own comments
- Delete own comments
- Report inappropriate comments

### 2. Discussion Features
- Upvote helpful comments
- Pin important comments (creator only)
- Sort by newest/oldest/popular
- Collapse/expand threads
- Load more pagination

### 3. Notifications
- Notify creator of new comments
- Notify on replies to your comments
- Notify on mentions (@username)
- Email digest option

### 4. Moderation
- Creator can hide comments
- Creator can disable comments
- Admin can remove comments
- Spam detection

## Database Schema
```typescript
export const promptComments = pgTable('prompt_comments', {
  id: uuid('id').primaryKey().defaultRandom(),
  promptId: uuid('prompt_id').references(() => userPrompts.id).notNull(),
  authorId: uuid('author_id').references(() => userProfiles.id).notNull(),
  
  // Content
  content: text('content').notNull(),
  
  // Threading
  parentId: uuid('parent_id').references(() => promptComments.id),
  depth: integer('depth').default(0),
  
  // Status
  isHidden: boolean('is_hidden').default(false),
  isPinned: boolean('is_pinned').default(false),
  
  // Engagement
  upvoteCount: integer('upvote_count').default(0),
  replyCount: integer('reply_count').default(0),
  
  // Timestamps
  createdAt: timestamp('created_at').defaultNow(),
  editedAt: timestamp('edited_at'),
}, (table) => [
  index('idx_comments_prompt').on(table.promptId),
  index('idx_comments_author').on(table.authorId),
  index('idx_comments_parent').on(table.parentId),
]);

export const commentUpvotes = pgTable('comment_upvotes', {
  commentId: uuid('comment_id').references(() => promptComments.id).notNull(),
  userId: uuid('user_id').references(() => userProfiles.id).notNull(),
  createdAt: timestamp('created_at').defaultNow(),
}, (table) => [
  primaryKey({ columns: [table.commentId, table.userId] }),
]);
```

## API Endpoints
- GET /api/prompts/[id]/comments
- POST /api/prompts/[id]/comments
- PATCH /api/comments/[id]
- DELETE /api/comments/[id]
- POST /api/comments/[id]/upvote
- POST /api/comments/[id]/report

## UI Components
- CommentSection - Full comment display
- CommentThread - Single thread
- CommentForm - New comment input
- CommentItem - Individual comment
- ReplyButton, UpvoteButton

## Limits
- Max 5000 characters per comment
- Max 10 levels of nesting
- Rate limit: 10 comments/hour
- Premium: higher limits

## Files to Create
- src/lib/db/schema/comments.ts
- src/app/api/prompts/[id]/comments/route.ts
- src/app/api/comments/[id]/route.ts
- src/components/comments/
- src/lib/comments/moderation.ts

## Success Criteria
- Comments work smoothly
- Threading displays correctly
- Notifications sent
- Moderation tools work

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-del9","title":"E2E Tests: CLI Authentication Flow","description":"Create comprehensive E2E tests for CLI authentication covering both local browser and remote device code flows.

Test Scenarios:
- Local browser flow: happy path, port conflicts, timeout, browser launch failure
- Remote device code flow: happy path, code expiration, slow poll, denied, invalid code
- Token persistence: save/load credentials, auto-refresh, re-login on expiry
- Integration tests: full login->whoami->list->logout flow

Logging Requirements:
- Log each test step with timestamps
- Log HTTP requests/responses (sanitize tokens)
- Log credential file operations
- Log browser/process spawning events
- Dump full state on failure for debugging

Test Infrastructure:
- Use Bun test runner
- Mock HTTP server for premium site endpoints
- Temporary credential directory per test
- Cleanup hooks for all resources

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-wi4g","title":"Add removable filter chips showing active filters","description":"# Task: Add Active Filter Chips with Remove Buttons

## Problem Statement
When users apply filters, the only indication is:
1. The pill button is highlighted (easy to miss if scrolled)
2. Text below results: "15 prompts for 'testing' with tags: unit-tests, automation"

Users can't:
- See at a glance what filters are active
- Remove individual filters without scrolling back
- Quickly understand why results are limited

## Current Behavior
```
Results Header
├── "Testing" (h2, if category selected)
├── "15 prompts" (p, count)
└── "with tags: unit-tests, automation" (p, inline text)
```

## Proposed Solution
Add a row of removable chips between filter controls and results:

```tsx
// ActiveFilterChips.tsx
interface ActiveFilterChipsProps {
  query: string;
  category: PromptCategory | null;
  tags: string[];
  onRemoveQuery: () => void;
  onRemoveCategory: () => void;
  onRemoveTag: (tag: string) => void;
  onClearAll: () => void;
}

export function ActiveFilterChips({
  query,
  category,
  tags,
  onRemoveQuery,
  onRemoveCategory,
  onRemoveTag,
  onClearAll,
}: ActiveFilterChipsProps) {
  const hasFilters = query || category || tags.length > 0;
  
  if (!hasFilters) return null;
  
  return (
    <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2 py-4 border-b border-neutral-200 dark:border-neutral-800">
      <span className="text-sm text-neutral-500 dark:text-neutral-400 mr-1">
        Active filters:
      </span>
      
      {/* Search query chip */}
      {query && (
        <FilterChip
          label={`"${query}"`}
          icon={<Search className="w-3 h-3" />}
          onRemove={onRemoveQuery}
        />
      )}
      
      {/* Category chip */}
      {category && (
        <FilterChip
          label={category}
          icon={<Folder className="w-3 h-3" />}
          onRemove={onRemoveCategory}
          className="capitalize"
        />
      )}
      
      {/* Tag chips */}
      {tags.map((tag) => (
        <FilterChip
          key={tag}
          label={tag}
          icon={<Tag className="w-3 h-3" />}
          onRemove={() => onRemoveTag(tag)}
        />
      ))}
      
      {/* Clear all */}
      <button
        onClick={onClearAll}
        className="ml-2 text-xs text-neutral-500 hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-white transition-colors"
      >
        Clear all
      </button>
    </div>
  );
}

// Individual chip component
function FilterChip({ 
  label, 
  icon, 
  onRemove,
  className 
}: { 
  label: string; 
  icon?: React.ReactNode;
  onRemove: () => void;
  className?: string;
}) {
  return (
    <span
      className={cn(
        "inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full",
        "bg-neutral-100 dark:bg-neutral-800 text-sm text-neutral-700 dark:text-neutral-300",
        "group transition-colors hover:bg-neutral-200 dark:hover:bg-neutral-700",
        className
      )}
    >
      {icon && <span className="text-neutral-400 dark:text-neutral-500">{icon}</span>}
      <span className="max-w-[150px] truncate">{label}</span>
      <button
        onClick={onRemove}
        className="ml-0.5 p-0.5 rounded-full text-neutral-400 hover:text-neutral-600 dark:hover:text-neutral-200 hover:bg-neutral-300 dark:hover:bg-neutral-600 transition-colors"
        aria-label={`Remove ${label} filter`}
      >
        <X className="w-3 h-3" />
      </button>
    </span>
  );
}
```

## Integration in page.tsx

```tsx
{/* Filter Controls */}
<div className="mb-4 space-y-4">
  <CategoryFilter ... />
  <TagFilter ... />
</div>

{/* Active Filter Chips */}
<ActiveFilterChips
  query={filters.query}
  category={filters.category}
  tags={filters.tags}
  onRemoveQuery={() => setQuery("")}
  onRemoveCategory={() => setCategory(null)}
  onRemoveTag={(tag) => setTags(filters.tags.filter(t => t !== tag))}
  onClearAll={clearFilters}
/>

{/* Results */}
<div className="mt-6">
  <h2>...</h2>
  <PromptGrid ... />
</div>
```

## Design Details
- **Chip style**: Rounded pill with subtle background
- **Icon per type**: Search icon for query, folder for category, tag for tags
- **Remove button**: X on right side, larger hit target on hover
- **Truncation**: Long values truncate with ellipsis
- **"Clear all"**: Text link at end, not a chip

## Accessibility
- Each chip's X button has aria-label: "Remove {filter} filter"
- Chips are focusable via keyboard
- Screen reader: "Active filters: search 'testing', category debugging, tag unit-tests"

## Animation (Optional)
- Chips animate in/out when added/removed
- Use Framer Motion AnimatePresence

## Testing
1. Apply search query → chip appears with query text
2. Apply category → chip appears with category name
3. Apply multiple tags → multiple tag chips appear
4. Click X on chip → that filter removed, results update
5. Click "Clear all" → all filters removed
6. Keyboard: Tab through chips, Enter to remove
7. Screen reader: chips announced correctly

## Files to Create/Modify
- NEW: apps/web/src/components/ActiveFilterChips.tsx
- MODIFY: apps/web/src/app/page.tsx

## Dependencies
- Should be done after "Clear All Filters" button redesign
